시편 39:1.content: I said, “I will watch my ways, so that I don’t sin with my tongue. I will keep my mouth with a bridle while the wicked is before me.”

시편 39:2.content: I was mute with silence. I held my peace, even from good. My sorrow was stirred.

시편 39:3.content: My heart was hot within me. While I meditated, the fire burned. I spoke with my tongue:

시편 39:4.content: “Yahweh, show me my end, what is the measure of my days. Let me know how frail I am.

시편 39:5.content: Behold, you have made my days hand widths. My lifetime is as nothing before you. Surely every man stands as a breath.”

시편 39:6.content: “Surely every man walks like a shadow. Surely they busy themselves in vain. He heaps up, and doesn’t know who shall gather.

시편 39:7.content: Now, Lord, what do I wait for? My hope is in you.

시편 39:8.content: Deliver me from all my transgressions. Don’t make me the reproach of the foolish.

시편 39:9.content: I was mute. I didn’t open my mouth, because you did it.

시편 39:10.content: Remove your scourge away from me. I am overcome by the blow of your hand.

시편 39:11.content: When you rebuke and correct man for iniquity, you consume his wealth like a moth. Surely every man is but a breath.”

시편 39:12.content: “Hear my prayer, Yahweh, and give ear to my cry. Don’t be silent at my tears. For I am a stranger with you, a foreigner, as all my fathers were.

시편 39:13.content: Oh spare me, that I may recover strength, before I go away and exist no more.”
